Pakistan 🇵🇰.text: Do you have a PVT LTD?
Do you have an API wallet?
Which bank's API wallet do you have?
Have you had any experience working in this field?
How many hours a day are you willing to devote to work?

Uruguay 🇺🇾.text:
Necesitaremos acceso a tu BROU para trabajar (nombre de usuario/contraseña). El pago es del 2,5 % del volumen total de tu cuenta, unos 100 dólares a la semana.
¿Te parece bien?

Egypt 🇪🇬.text: Do you have at least 3 Vodafone accounts, Paymob, and 1 mobile phone for work?
We require a security deposit (prepay) for this region in the future to build trust. Are you ready to provide a security deposit when requested?
Salary is $50/week (if giving $30 prepay) or 2% of turnover without prepay (up to 3-4% with prepay depending on accounts). Do you agree to these terms?

Nepal 🇳🇵.text: Do you have at least two accounts in Khalti or eSewa (e.g., 2 Khalti, 2 eSewa, or 1 of each)?
Do you have a Fonepay account, or are you ready to open one?
To work with us long-term, we require a security deposit (prepay) of at least $50. Are you ready to provide this prepay in the future?

Mali 🇲🇱.text: Do you have Wave, Orange, or Moov accounts?
Authorization is via phone number. Are you ready to provide OTP (or auth links) and PINs for the accounts?
The payment is fixed at 30$ per week if accesses are provided. Do you agree to these terms?

Bhutan 🇧🇹.text: Do you have a BNB account?
We need account number and account name. Later we may require Login/Pass to check transactions. Are you okay with providing these?
Salary is $20/week on Mondays, OR 5% of daily turnover if you work with a prepay (security deposit). Do you agree?

Papua New Guinea 🇵🇬.text: Do you have a BSP account?
We need account number and account name. Later we may require Login/Pass to check transactions. Are you okay with providing these?
Salary is $20/week on Mondays, OR 4% of daily turnover if you work with a prepay (security deposit). Do you agree?

Jamaica 🇯🇲.text: Do you have BOTH Scotiabank and Lynk accounts available EXCLUSIVELY for our work (No personal use allowed)?
Are you using an Android phone? (ZTE phones are NOT supported for Lynk).
You must be available daily for 15-30 mins to do p2p trades, transfers, and send screenshots. Ready?
Salary is $50/week initially, and can increase to $75/week for loyal partners. Do you agree?

Costa Rica 🇨🇷.text: ¿Tienes una cuenta personal en BAC Credomatic con SINPE conectado?
La cuenta debe estar activa y sin saldo negativo. ¿Estás dispuesto a instalar una app de sms-forwarder para trabajar?
El pago es fijo de 75 USDT semanales + bono de 15$ por realizar tareas. ¿Estás de acuerdo con estas condiciones?
